Class AlcoholLogResponse

java.lang.Object
ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AlcoholLogResponse
public class AlcoholLogResponse extends Object
Response body representing a single alcohol log entry.

Returned by the alcohol log endpoints to expose log data without leaking internal entity structure.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • AlcoholLogResponse

      public AlcoholLogResponse(Long id, AlcoholLogType type, String notes, LocalDateTime recordedAt, String recordedBy, Integer guestAge, Double alcoholPercentage, Boolean idChecked, Boolean serviceDenied)
      Constructs an AlcoholLogResponse with all fields.
      Parameters:
      id - the log entry ID
      type - the log type
      notes - optional notes
      recordedAt - the timestamp of the entry
      recordedBy - the email of the user who recorded it
      guestAge - the guest's age, if applicable
      alcoholPercentage - the alcohol percentage, if applicable
      idChecked - whether ID was checked, if applicable
      serviceDenied - whether service was denied, if applicable
